notes: Composition-pinning source contract (calc-chrome / calc-formula-bar precedent) for Math symbol insertion, placeholder navigation and error recovery (WIN-MA-002). It pins the three upstream StarMath behavioural primitives chapter 12.2 declares normative -- placeholder marks (<?>), error text+position pairing with a non-destructive clear path, and symbol-insertion focus-return -- plus the native multilineeditbox part the editor maps to, plus the F4/Shift+F4 (mark) and F3/Shift+F3 (error) accelerator/command/menu bindings. CRITICAL HONESTY / GATE CONTRACT: this is a D-gate source pin ONLY. Per docs/WINDOWS_UI_INVENTORY.md's gate contract, existing upstream UI source never satisfies the M (Material) gate, so this contract does NOT advance WIN-MA-002's M glyph -- it proves the substrate the Material design builds on is present and unregressed, nothing more (advances_m:false). The three Material differentiators (symbol-cell hover treatment, canvas sub-expression highlight, inline @error-container banner) stay status:'specified'/build-bound and this checker fails closed if any is promoted to an implemented/runtime claim. starmath has ZERO Material token consumption today, so there is deliberately no guarded-material-source component. runtime_verified:false throughout; no build, no pixels, no interaction.

behavior_markers.role: the <?> placeholder mark drives next/prev selection
SID_NEXTMARK/SID_PREVMARK route to SelNextMark/SelPrevMark and return focus
ShowError pairs the error text with the token position (MarkError by row/col)
MarkError selects the offending token by (row, col)
ShowError(nullptr) is the clear-on-parse path; error cycling keeps focus and never blanks the canvas
InsertText fills the first placeholder with the selection, lands on the next <?> and returns focus
the Elements panel emits an inserted element's markup via GetElementSource

material_carve_outs.description: symbol-cell Material hover/focus treatment: @primary-container fill, @primary border, @on-primary-container glyph (12.2 flow 2); prototype-only, build-bound.
canvas sub-expression highlight synced to placeholder navigation (12.2 flow 3, 'Specified here, not yet implemented'); build-bound.
@error-container / @on-error-container inline error banner + error-text-slot underline (12.2 markup-error state, 'Specified here, not yet implemented'); build-bound.
